code: export class RoleplayCombatCooldownParser{constructor(){this._weaponType=4;this._totalMs=0;this._remainingMs=0;}flush(){this._weaponType=4;this._totalMs=0;this._remainingMs=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){this._weaponType=wrapper.readInt();this._totalMs=wrapper.readInt();this._remainingMs=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get weaponType(){return this._weaponType;}get totalMs(){return this._totalMs;}get remainingMs(){return this._remainingMs;}}
